summary: Full v2 feature testing completed for Sachin Schedule mobile app. All 21 backend API tests passed (including 6 new v2 feature tests). All frontend UI tests passed including login, dashboard with date header, 11 schedule blocks, Morning Routine as ONE block, Sunday Study sessions, auto-scroll to NOW block, task timing feature, History day detail modal, Analytics with delay insights. Fixed MongoDB _id exposure bug in /api/auth/me endpoint.

issues: Console warnings about deprecated 'shadow*' style props - should use 'boxShadow' instead (cosmetic only, not breaking)

action_items: Optional: Update StyleSheet to use boxShadow instead of shadow* props to remove console warnings
critical_code_review_comments: ✅ All v2 backend endpoints working correctly (set-time, analytics, day detail)
✅ GET /api/schedule returns 11 blocks with end_time field
✅ GET /api/history/day/{date} returns incomplete_details for missed tasks
✅ Morning Routine is ONE unified block (8:10-9:30) with all items
✅ Sunday correctly shows Study Session 1/2 instead of Work Session
✅ Auto-scroll to NOW block working correctly
✅ Task timing feature (clock icon) opens time picker modal and saves correctly
✅ History day detail modal shows missed and completed tasks
✅ MongoDB _id properly excluded from /api/auth/me response (bug fixed)
✅ All React Native components used correctly (View, Text, TouchableOpacity)
✅ testID attributes present on all interactive elements
✅ 4 tabs navigation working: Today, History, Analytics, Settings
seed_data_creation: Admin user sachin@example.com/sachin123 seeded on startup. Test data created during testing with task toggles and task timings.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All v2 features working correctly. Today is Sunday (5 Apr 2026) so schedule shows Study sessions instead of Work sessions. Backend tests cover all v2 endpoints: set-time, analytics with delay insights, day detail with incomplete tasks. Frontend tests verified: date header, day badge, 11 blocks, Morning Routine as ONE block, auto-scroll to NOW, task timing modal, History day detail modal, Analytics period selector and insights sections. Some tasks have been toggled and task timings set during testing.
rca_of_issue: MongoDB _id exposure in /api/auth/me: Root cause was that get_current_user() returns user dict with _id field, and /api/auth/me was directly returning this dict. Fix: Modified /api/auth/me endpoint to filter out _id and replace with id field before returning response. Verified fix with pytest - all 21 tests now pass.
